/CAL:DEFENSE MOTION FOR RETURN OF PROPERTY/DAWT/X:RONNIE WAGNER APPEARS FOR SFPD LEGAL DIVISION,/X:MOTION FOR RETURN OF PROPERTY IS GRANTED IN PART, AND DENIED IN PART,/X:ORDER FOR RETURN OF THE IPHONE, BLACK BACKPACK, BLUE BAG AND BROWN CARDBOARD BOX WITHOUT ITS CONTENTS SIGNED & FILED,/X:ORDER FOR DESTRUCTION OF MARIJUANA & HASHISH UNTIL 02-24-15 SIGNED AND FILED,/

/CAL:PRELIM HRG AND MTS/CAL:PRELIM HRG AND MTS/WIT SWORN:SFPD GARY CHENG/EXHM:PEOPLE 1- SCREEN SHOT OF INSTAGRAM/X:COURT GRANT MOTION TO SUPPRESS/MO PC 1385:PEOPLE UNABLE TO SUBSTAIN BURDEN OF PROOF /FORF/

/CAL:PRELIMINARY HEARING & MOTION TO SUPPRESS/DAWT/X:DEFENSE ORAL MOTIONTO CONTINUE ON BEHALF OF CO-DEFENDANT AUSTIN  SANCHEZ IS GRANTED OVER THE PEOPLE'S OBJECTION,/LD:01-20-15 (60TH)/TE:4 HOURS/CONTD:PRELIMINARY HEARING & MOTION TO SUPPRESS/DOPC/

/CAL:PRELIMINARY HEARING & MOTION TO SUPPRESS/X:PEOPLE'S ORAL MOTION TO CONTINUE MOTION TO SUPPRESS IS GRANTED, PEOPLE ARE READY TO PROCEED ON THE PRELIMINARY HEARING, HOWEVER DEFENDANT'S WOULD LIKE MOTION TO BE HEARD CONCURRENTLY/LDPX:12-08-14/CONTD PRELIM HRG, DOP/CONTD:FOR PRELIMINARY HEARING & MOTION TO SUPPRESS/DOP/

/CAL:ARRAIGNMENT/X:PUBLIC DEFENDER DECLARES CONFLICT,/CON:SCOTT SUGARMAN//TEXT:DEFT ENT NG PLEA(S) & DEN OF ALLEG/FAWC/DEFTARR1/NTW/LDPX:12-08-14/OR/X:CONDITIONS OF OR ARE AS FOLLOWS:/DEF:MUST NOT POSSESS ANY ILLEGAL DRUGS/DEF:MUST MAINTAIN CONTACT WITH HIS ATTORNEY/DEF:MUST MAKE ALL FUTURECOURT APPEARANCES/CONTD:PRELIMINARY HEARING/DOP/
/CAL:PRELIMINARY HEARING & PC 1538,5 MOTION TO SUPPRESS/LD:01-20-15 (60TH)/TE:4 HOURS/CONTD:PRELIMINARY HEARING & MOTION TO SUPPRESS/DOP/
/CAL:TO SET/LD:01-20-15 (60TH)/TE:4 HOURS/CONTD:PRELIMINARY HEARING & MOTION TO SUPPRESS/DOP/
/CAL:PRELIM HRG & MTS/LDPX:01-20-15/TE:3-4 HOURS/CONTD:TO SET PX & MTS/DOP/
